pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 17 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build will compile against Java 8 semantics, potentially missing features or failing to enforce Java 17 language rules required by the migration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace or supplement the older javax.inject API.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code migrated to Jakarta EE namespaces (jakarta.inject) will fail to compile or run with a NoClassDefFoundError if the jakarta.inject-api dependency is missing.
